title: UsefulMagic
description: A mod which add Magicitems in Minecraft to spawn a MagicCircle with particles.
body:
# UsefulMagic
This mod adds a lot of magic to Minecraft, allowing you to use it to kill mobs and add more ways to your battles. It denpends on [CooParticlesAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/cooparticlesapi) and [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin).

### Functions
**This Mod feature adds many "wands" and a "magic synthesis table", where you can synthesize these wands through the "magic synthesis table" or "workbench". You can use these wands to deal damage to entities such as Mobs and Player. The wands will be accompanied by a magic array when used, and you need to gather energy to use them. This can change your attack experience and make your attacks look better**

### Promotional Video
[This is a promotional video on bilibili.com.](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Q2EDzZEKn)
### Wands
![Wands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71ac74756bea28a34b92e2c86e59bfc9612aef9_0.webp)
![cfbc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d3407cdb4a1cd22e9db6b7ca9b8873212b1c9d3_0.webp)

**You can use various magic formations through these Wands, which can be obtained through the workbench and magic synthesis platform.**

### Magic Circle
![p1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe86b69266f31a5821cb5bd1936f01493a3b45fe_0.webp)![p2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e79ddab727e0b7821194366e7cfc1964591fa00e_0.webp)
![p3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e0aefced179f20d5e1cb4497fd013d0ea4b0f0d_0.webp)![p4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c39b5a52f99ff2d790387b02855310b0a58be33_0.webp)
![p5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9497d0be08ed527ec798a97091f8f98f5c9db77d_0.webp)

**By using magic power, hold down the right-click button to store energy and release the magic array. The strength of the magic array depends on your energy storage time**

### Magic Power
![pp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb346887481c3b83f6adf343ffa975f6a9e0b1eb_0.webp)

**You can restore your magic power by using stars and magic potions. Magic power is the energy you release from your magic array.**

### Magic Synthesis Platform
![b1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0923474327740c27694eba8299857e16afa1a3d8_0.webp)
![b2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a8bb1c2a732312f131f2b867886c42512bc767_0.webp)

**You need to place the magic synthesis table and put the corresponding items into it to synthesize items.
You can use the magic potion bottle to obtain the magic potion by right clicking on the floating square**

### Install
if want to use it in server,you need install put it in mods folder each server and client,else only client mods folder.
